author: @Chad-b7w
text: I was trying to use open claw to make bots I can play games with. (Wing man on metal storm)It still needs multiple devices if your on mobile. Or at least using split screen. I was using gemini to learn how to do everything. Its very complicated only using open claw on mobile device. The other code insert app is also very complicated to learn.

author: @jackstrawful
text: Some sorely needed good news for OpenAI, and in an area that counters one of the bigger knocks against them - all the top talent that has left. Bringing in a big name, not with some absurdly massive payday, a la Meta, but simply by being the most inviting, desirable place for someone more interested in having opportunities to do things than in getting the most money.The arrival in the last few weeks of agentic systems finally able to do real work has greatly tamped down the narrative of an imminent bubble pop, due to the insanely huge numbers of tokens these agents burn through providing a real justification for the massive CapEx being poured into AI infrastructure. And now the one name most associated with that arrival will be working to support OpenAI.
